app_release_notes: v1.2.17 - Chronograph files that hold sessions from several range days no longer get spliced into one ladder by accident. Loadscope now builds the ladder from a single day's sessions, shows the date on every session so you can see what it picked, and lets you place any leftover session by hand. Fixes an import screen that rendered with unreadable labels on Windows.

Loadscope now builds the ladder from a single day's sessions, shows the date on every session so you can see what it picked, and lets you place any leftover session by hand. windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.17 - Chronograph files that hold sessions from several range days no longer get spliced into one ladder by accident. Loadscope now builds the ladder from a single day's sessions, shows the date on every session so you can see what it picked, and lets you place any leftover session by hand. Also fixes dialogs that showed unreadable text on Windows.
